'''sachumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycofabrication|mycofabrication]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycofabrication|mycofabrication]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sachumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchimith|sæchimith]] || [[word:sæchimij|sæchimij]] || [[word:sæchimish|sæchimish]] || [[word:sæchimi|sæchimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachuchumuth|sachuchumuth]] || [[word:sachuchumuj|sachuchumuj]] || [[word:sachuchumush|sachuchumush]] || [[word:sachuchumu|sachuchumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachumuth|sachumuth]] || [[word:sachumuj|sachumuj]] || [[word:sachumush|sachumush]] || [[word:sachumu|sachumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachufmuth|sachufmuth]] || [[word:sachufmuj|sachufmuj]] || [[word:sachufmush|sachufmush]] || [[word:sachufmuf|sachufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachumuthu|sachumuthu]] || [[word:sachumuju|sachumuju]] || [[word:sachumushu|sachumushu]] || [[word:sachumuku|sachumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachumuth|sachumuth]] || [[word:sachumuj|sachumuj]] || [[word:sachumush|sachumush]] || [[word:sachumu|sachumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachumuthul|sachumuthul]] || [[word:sachumujul|sachumujul]] || [[word:sachumushul|sachumushul]] || [[word:sachumukul|sachumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachumuthuthu|sachumuthuthu]] || [[word:sachumujuju|sachumujuju]] || [[word:sachumushushu|sachumushushu]] || [[word:sachumuku|sachumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachumuthun|sachumuthun]] || [[word:sachumujun|sachumujun]] || [[word:sachumushun|sachumushun]] || [[word:sachumukun|sachumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachumuthuoro|sachumuthuoro]] || [[word:sachumujuoro|sachumujuoro]] || [[word:sachumushuoro|sachumushuoro]] || [[word:sachumukuoro|sachumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
